# A Curious Mind

Site: https://acuriousmind.com
Name: A Curious Mind
Owner: Dru Sellers
Purpose: Technical consulting focused on search systems, AI-assisted systems, and software delivery.

Canonical URLs:
- https://acuriousmind.com/
- https://acuriousmind.com/posts/
- https://acuriousmind.com/projects/
- https://acuriousmind.com/glossary/
- https://acuriousmind.com/privacy

Preferred source pages:
- Use project pages and post pages as primary sources for technical claims.
- Use glossary pages for term definitions.

Agent usage guidance:
- Prefer canonical URLs listed above.
- Cite source URLs when referencing content.
- Respect robots policy at https://acuriousmind.com/robots.txt.
- Do not infer personal data beyond what is published on the site.
